name: Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Touch Enterprise
title: Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Touch Enterprise
short_description: Premium Desktop VoIP Phone. The UniFi G3 Touch Enterprise is a sophisticated desktop VoIP phone designed for modern business environments. It features a large 7-inch multi-touch HD display with 1280 × 800 resolution and anti-glare coating for sharp visibility in any lighting. Fully supporting UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, it seamlessly integrates into UniFi’s communication ecosystem while also enabling connectivity with third-party PBX platforms for expanded flexibility.
description: The UniFi G3 Touch Enterprise is a sophisticated desktop VoIP phone designed for modern business environments. It features a large 7-inch multi-touch HD display with 1280 × 800 resolution and anti-glare coating for sharp visibility in any lighting. Fully supporting UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, it seamlessly integrates into UniFi’s communication ecosystem while also enabling connectivity with third-party PBX platforms for expanded flexibility. The built-in 5 MP camera with a privacy shutter ensures secure and professional video conferencing. Its ergonomic handset includes a convenient mute button for quick audio control during calls. Constructed from durable polycarbonate and aluminum alloy materials, this phone combines strength with an elegant appearance. Its stable, non-slip base fits perfectly on any desk, and the intuitive user interface enhances efficiency, helping enterprise users manage calls, contacts, and apps effortlessly.

detailed_description.heading: Premium Desktop VoIP Phone
detailed_description.text: The UniFi G3 Touch Enterprise is a sophisticated desktop VoIP phone designed for modern business environments. It features a large 7-inch multi-touch HD display with 1280 × 800 resolution and anti-glare coating for sharp visibility in any lighting. Fully supporting UniFi Talk and Talk Relay, it seamlessly integrates into UniFi’s communication ecosystem while also enabling connectivity with third-party PBX platforms for expanded flexibility. The built-in 5 MP camera with a privacy shutter ensures secure and professional video conferencing. Its ergonomic handset includes a convenient mute button for quick audio control during calls. Constructed from durable polycarbonate and aluminum alloy materials, this phone combines strength with an elegant appearance. Its stable, non-slip base fits perfectly on any desk, and the intuitive user interface enhances efficiency, helping enterprise users manage calls, contacts, and apps effortlessly.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Connectivity and Clear Audio
detailed_description.text: Designed for flexibility, the G3 Touch Enterprise offers multiple connectivity options to suit modern offices. It includes two Gigabit Ethernet ports, dual-band Wi-Fi (802.11a/b/g/n/ac) for reliable wireless connections, and Bluetooth 4.2 with additional support for Bluetooth 5.2, ideal for pairing accessories or the optional G3 Wireless Handset. NFC compatibility supports ISO/IEC 14443A/B, 15693, and 18092 standards, enabling fast and secure device pairing and integration with access systems. For professional audio, the phone integrates dual 3 W speakers and omnidirectional MEMS microphones for clear hands-free calls. The ergonomic handset features a wideband receiver, electret microphone, and mute button for improved control. A 3.5 mm headset jack allows connection of high-quality headsets. Power is provided via PoE (44–57 V DC) or USB-C (5 V, 3 A), with maximum power consumption of only 11 W for energy-efficient operation.

detailed_description.heading: High Performance and Reliability
detailed_description.text: The G3 Touch Enterprise is powered by an octa-core ARM Cortex-A53 processor with 2 GB RAM and 32 GB of internal storage, ensuring fast, responsive operation for multitasking and advanced call management. It supports integration with UniFi Talk, Talk Relay, and third-party PBX systems for versatile deployment options. Designed for consistent enterprise use, the device operates reliably within 0 °C to 40 °C temperatures and up to 90% non-condensing humidity. A customizable RGBW LED indicator provides at-a-glance status notifications for users. Compliant with FCC, IC, CE, and NDAA standards, it meets rigorous security and performance requirements. The G3 Touch Enterprise is a robust, secure, and feature-rich VoIP phone for demanding professional environments, delivering reliable communication, advanced features, and an elegant design tailored for enterprise workspaces.
